mapper.select: SELECT esr.*, ea.arrangeDate, ea.session, es.seatNumber, er.roomName FROM exam_student_room esr LEFT JOIN exam_arrange ea ON esr.examCode = ea.examCode LEFT JOIN exam_seat es ON esr.seatId = es.seatId LEFT JOIN exam_room er ON esr.roomId = er.roomId WHERE esr.studentId = #{studentId} ORDER BY ea.arrangeDate, ea.session

SELECT esr.*, s.studentName, es.seatNumber, er.roomName FROM exam_student_room esr LEFT JOIN student s ON esr.studentId = s.studentId LEFT JOIN exam_seat es ON esr.seatId = es.seatId LEFT JOIN exam_room er ON esr.roomId = er.roomId WHERE esr.examCode = #{examCode} ORDER BY er.roomId, es.seatNumber

SELECT esr.*, s.studentName, es.seatNumber FROM exam_student_room esr LEFT JOIN student s ON esr.studentId = s.studentId LEFT JOIN exam_seat es ON esr.seatId = es.seatId WHERE esr.examCode = #{examCode} AND esr.roomId = #{roomId} ORDER BY es.seatNumber
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_student_room (examCode, studentId, roomId, seatId, status) VALUES (#{examCode}, #{studentId}, #{roomId}, #{seatId}, #{status})

INSERT INTO exam_student_room (examCode, studentId, roomId, seatId, status) VALUES
(#{item.examCode}, #{item.studentId}, #{item.roomId}, #{item.seatId}, #{item.status})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_student_room SET status = #{status} WHERE assignId = #{assignId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM exam_student_room WHERE studentId = #{studentId} AND examCode = #{examCode}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_student_room WHERE studentId = #{studentId} AND examCode = #{examCode}
